description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in traditional monastic attire, featuring a voluminous, draped robe with a lustrous, metallic sheen. The robe is wrapped over one shoulder and covers the body down to the ankles, leaving the feet bare. The figure has a shaved head and a calm, neutral facial expression, with hands relaxed at the sides. The garment's folds and draping are highly detailed, giving a sense of weight and texture to the fabric. The overall appearance suggests a Buddhist monk or similar religious practitioner, with an emphasis on simplicity and serenity. The figure stands upright, with a natural, relaxed posture.
description: An adult figure in a shiny, draped monastic robe with a shaved head and bare feet, standing upright in a calm pose.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed draping of the robe, the shaved head, and the relaxed facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered folds of the robe and the relaxed position of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back drape of the robe and the bare feet, with the head and shoulders clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the robe's over-the-shoulder wrap and the right arm's relaxed position.
attribute_clothing_type: draped monastic robe with voluminous folds
